title: See how Gemma  can explore, plan, and scale!
summary: A Google for Developers video demonstrates how Gemma, alongside ADK, BigQuery MCP, and Cloud Run, can optimize business operations through exploration and scaling of large datasets. The presentation covers practical application of these tools for data-driven decision making.
writeup: Google for Developers demonstrates how Gemma integrates with the Agent Development Kit (ADK), a BigQuery MCP connection, and Cloud Run to explore datasets and optimize business operations. The video matters because it shows Gemma operating as part of a tool chain rather than in isolation, connecting a model to data infrastructure and deployment. The key takeaways: Gemma can explore datasets and plan tasks through ADK and BigQuery MCP, and Cloud Run provides the path to scale the resulting workflows.
